summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gradebook GPA display and Category Management features. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication works
Backend: GET /api/classes returns user's classes
Backend: POST /api/classes creates new class
Backend: GET /api/gradebook/{class_id} returns gradebook with students, assignments, categories, grades
Backend: GET /api/classes/{class_id}/categories returns categories
Backend: POST /api/classes/{class_id}/categories creates category with bilingual names (name, name_es)
Backend: PUT /api/categories/{category_id} updates category name, name_es, weight_percent
Backend: DELETE /api/categories/{category_id} deletes category without assignments
Backend: DELETE /api/categories/{category_id} returns 400 when category has assignments
Backend: GPA calculation formula verified (percentage/100 * 4.0)
Backend: GPA scale matches school's custom scale (A≥3.50, B≥2.50, C≥1.60, D≥0.80, F<0.80)
Frontend: Gradebook page loads successfully
Frontend: GPA displayed for each student (e.g., 3.18 GPA)
Frontend: Letter grade displayed in colored badge (B in blue)
Frontend: Percentage displayed below GPA (79.5%)
Frontend: Categories button opens management dialog
Frontend: Category manager shows GPA scale reference (5 color-coded boxes)
Frontend: Category manager shows total weight percentage (Peso Total: 135%)
Frontend: Add new category form has English name, Spanish name, and weight fields
Frontend: Category creation shows success toast (Categoría creada)
Frontend: Category deletion shows success toast (Categoría eliminada)
Frontend: Edit mode shows editable fields for name, name_es, weight_percent
Frontend: Edit mode has Save and Cancel buttons
seed_data_creation: Test categories created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gradebook GPA and Category Management features fully functional. GPA calculation: percentage/100 * 4.0. Letter grades: A≥3.50, B≥2.50, C≥1.60, D≥0.80, F<0.80. Category CRUD operations work via /api/classes/{class_id}/categories (POST), /api/categories/{category_id} (PUT/DELETE). Test credentials: test@school.edu / testpassword (role: super_admin). Data-testid attributes: manage-categories-btn, gradebook-class-select

gpa_display.letter_grade: Displayed in colored badge (A=green, B=blue, C=yellow, D=orange, F=red)

category_management.create: Form with English name, Spanish name, weight percentage
category_management.delete: Trash icon, blocked if category has assignments

bilingual_support.display: Shows appropriate name based on language setting
